title: Aether PBR
description: PBR resource pack for The Aether Mod
body:
# Aether PBR [![](https://github.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR/raw/main/tags/Github-black.svg)](https://github.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR) [![](https://github.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR/raw/main/tags/Modrinth-0E1115.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-pbr) [![](https://github.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR/raw/main/tags/Curse_Forege-0E1115.svg)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/aether-pbr) PBR Resource pack for [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) mod
> Based on extensive testing in various scenarios, [Complementary](https://www.complementary.dev/) has proven to be the best shader for running PBR with minimal bugs. While the screenshots were taken using **Sundial** and **Bliss** together, it is recommended to use **Complementary** for gameplay.
![https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR/main/pixelgraph/pack.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DominoKorean/Aether-PBR/main/pixelgraph/pack.png)
